---
name: Codex task
about: A scoped, verifiable task for RPG To-Do
title: "[Codex] "
labels: ""
assignees: ""
---

## Problem
<!-- Observable issue or opportunity. -->

## User impact
<!-- Who is affected and how? -->

## Current behavior

## Desired behavior

## Acceptance criteria
- [ ] <!-- Observable and testable outcome. -->
- [ ] <!-- Include relevant edge/device/storage behavior. -->

## Non-goals
- [ ] <!-- Adjacent work intentionally excluded. -->

## Constraints
<!-- Product/domain, persistence, UX, release, performance, or platform limits. -->

## Evidence
<!-- Screenshots, logs, reproduction steps, related issues, or tests. -->

## Relevant files
<!-- Optional known paths; exploration confirms them. -->

## Manual QA
<!-- Required device, lifecycle, resize, or accessibility checks. -->

## Risks
<!-- State, storage, calendar, selection, UI, or release risks. -->

## Definition of done
- [ ] Acceptance criteria verified or explicitly marked not verified.
- [ ] Tests and required validation completed.
- [ ] Documentation/backlog updated when applicable.
